metadata.name: El Salvador Real Estate KB Bootstrap
metadata.goal: Expand a source-disciplined research wiki from a seed investor article into a durable El Salvador real-estate knowledge base.

tasks.title: Expand source map with official and Spanish-first material
tasks.description: Add at least 10 more sources covering property law, permitting, tourism, remittances, financing, demographics, and hazard exposure. Prefer primary sources and Spanish-language local material where it is stronger.
acceptanceCriteria: each new source has a one-line note on why it matters
at least 4 new sources are Spanish-language

tasks.title: Build submarket pages
tasks.description: Create initial wiki pages for San Salvador, La Libertad / Surf City, and a diaspora-demand lens. Distinguish sourced facts from inference.
acceptanceCriteria: each page has Sourced, Inference, and Needs verification sections
each page links back to the main thesis

tasks.title: Add legal and transaction mechanics page
tasks.description: Create a page for title, registry, closing, taxes, restrictions, and foreign-buyer mechanics using official or legal-practice sources.
acceptanceCriteria: at least 3 primary or near-primary references are included

tasks.title: Produce investor memo output
tasks.description: Write a concise memo that states where the article thesis looks right, where it overreaches, and what would change the conclusion.
acceptanceCriteria: memo cites wiki pages and sources
memo includes a bull case, base case, and failure case
